title: Sorcery Age Incarnation Addon
description: This mod is an addon introducing a full incarnation system, there may be more in the future.
body: Implements a incarnation system similar to sukuna, adds incarnation with requirements, full player to player interaction, this does not change the base vessel interaction with sukuna NPC. Incarnate to Vessel only chatting, Vessel Takeover, new Shrine structure, and ability to learn incarnate innate technique.
